elements.name: A new user can register, login, and purchase a product

steps.name: I am on the registration page
I register a new user
I should be logged in successfully
I login with the newly registered user's credentials
I should be logged in successfully
I navigate to the 'ART' category
I select a random product
I add the product to the cart
I should see the product in the cart
I proceed to checkout
I complete the checkout
I should see an order confirmation

steps.name: I navigate to the sign in page
I login with the registered user email and incorrect password
I should see an error message about invalid credentials
I navigate to the sign in page
I login with a non-existent email and password
I should see an error message about invalid credentials
I am on the home page
I click on the sign in link
I register a new user
I should be logged in successfully
the user details should be saved to "registeredUser.json"

elements.name: Registration fails with invalid email format

steps.name: I am on the registration page
I try to register with an invalid email format
I should see an email validation error

elements.name: Registration fails with password too short

steps.name: I am on the registration page
I try to register with a password that is too short
I should see a password validation error

elements.name: User cannot add item to wishlist without being logged in

steps.name: I am on the home page
I navigate to the ART category without logging in
I try to favorite an item without authentication
I should be redirected to the login page

elements.name: Creating duplicate wishlist fails with error

steps.name: I am logged in
I navigate to the ART category
I favorite a random item
the wishlists popup should appear
I create a new wishlist with a specific name
I try to create another wishlist with the same name
I should see a duplicate wishlist error message
I am logged in
I navigate to the ART category
I favorite a random item
the wishlists popup should appear
I create a new wishlist
I add the item to the new wishlist
the product added toast should be displayed
